positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a vibrant jungle canopy at sunrise. The composition features strong, clean silhouettes of diverse tropical leaves and exotic flora (such as Monstera and banana leaves) against a gradient background of deep sapphire blue merging into brilliant gold and warm coral pink. Use negative space dramatically to create a repeating, interlocking pattern suitable for textile printing. The artistic style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern graphic design, emphasizing geometric flow and high contrast. Cinematic, ethereal lighting, volumetric glow emanating from the center, perfect symmetry, vector art quality, highly detailed, clean edges.
negative: text, logo, watermark, messy, dirty, blur, grainy, noise, poorly drawn hands, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, signature
